summary: Iteration 55: Lifecycle Mode Control UI tests completed. All 14 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified: 4 mode buttons (OFF, TAG ONLY, SHADOW, AUTO EXIT) with correct data-testids, segmented control with descriptions, confirmation modals for SHADOW_EXIT and AUTO_EXIT (with red title and warning), Cancel closes modal without changing mode, OFF/TAG ONLY direct switch without modal, toast notification on mode change, Lifecycle tab badge shows exit candidate count, current mode badge visible with ring highlight.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/strategies/weather/lifecycle/mode accepts valid modes (off, tag_only, shadow_exit, auto_exit) - PASS
POST /api/strategies/weather/lifecycle/mode returns status, previous_mode, current_mode - PASS
POST /api/strategies/weather/lifecycle/mode rejects invalid mode values with 400 error - PASS
POST /api/strategies/weather/lifecycle/mode returns unchanged when setting same mode - PASS
POST /api/strategies/weather/lifecycle/mode persists to lifecycle endpoint - PASS
Mode change tag_only → shadow_exit works correctly - PASS
Mode change shadow_exit → tag_only works correctly - PASS
Mode change to auto_exit and back works correctly - PASS
Response includes 'persisted' field on update - PASS
Response includes 'timestamp' field on update - PASS
Lifecycle dashboard shows correct mode in config - PASS
Exit candidates endpoint works after mode changes - PASS
Mode restored to tag_only after testing - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: Lifecycle mode control component exists (data-testid='lifecycle-mode-control') - PASS
Mode button OFF exists (data-testid='mode-btn-off') with correct label - PASS
Mode button TAG ONLY exists (data-testid='mode-btn-tag_only') with correct label - PASS
Mode button SHADOW exists (data-testid='mode-btn-shadow_exit') with correct label - PASS
Mode button AUTO EXIT exists (data-testid='mode-btn-auto_exit') with correct label - PASS
Current active mode (TAG ONLY) has visual ring highlight - PASS
OFF button does NOT show confirmation modal (direct switch) - PASS
TAG ONLY button does NOT show confirmation modal (direct switch) - PASS
SHADOW button opens confirmation modal with 'Enable SHADOW EXIT?' title - PASS
AUTO EXIT button opens confirmation modal with red 'Enable AUTO EXIT?' title - PASS
AUTO EXIT modal contains warning about real sell orders - PASS
Cancel button (data-testid='mode-confirm-cancel') exists and closes modal - PASS
Accept button (data-testid='mode-confirm-accept') exists and switches mode - PASS
Toast notification appears on successful mode change - PASS
Lifecycle tab badge shows exit candidate count: 'Lifecycle (3)' - PASS
Previous lifecycle features (dashboard, simulator, exit candidates) still functional - PASS

details: 4 segmented mode buttons: OFF, TAG ONLY, SHADOW, AUTO EXIT
Each button shows description: 'No evaluation', 'Tagging only', 'Simulated exits', 'Real exits'
Current mode (TAG ONLY) highlighted with ring
Config values displayed: Profit 2x, Edge -100bp, Decay 60%, Time 18h
SHADOW EXIT modal: amber title 'Enable SHADOW EXIT?', explains simulation behavior
AUTO EXIT modal: red title 'Enable AUTO EXIT?', warning about real sell orders
Both have Cancel and Accept buttons with correct data-testids
OFF and TAG ONLY skip confirmation modal (direct switch)
Mode changes persisted to MongoDB config
Mode reflected in GET /api/positions/weather/lifecycle
Mode reflected in GET /api/positions/by-strategy lifecycle field
Mode restored to tag_only after testing as requested
Toast shows: 'Lifecycle mode: tag_only → shadow_exit'
Toast shows: 'Lifecycle mode: shadow_exit → tag_only'
Uses sonner toast library
Tab shows 'Lifecycle (3)' with exit candidate count
Exit candidates summary shows 3 candidates with 4.31x avg profit multiple
Dashboard endpoint returns all expected fields
Lifecycle status shows 54 evaluations with config
Exit candidates shows 3 candidates
Simulator endpoint works with custom thresholds

invalid_mode_response.detail: Invalid mode 'invalid'. Must be one of: auto_exit, off, shadow_exit, tag_only

test_credentials: None required - paper mode, no auth
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data (54 open weather positions, 3 exit candidates with 4.31x avg profit multiple)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 verified Lifecycle Mode Control UI. Key findings: (1) POST /api/strategies/weather/lifecycle/mode endpoint accepts 4 modes (off, tag_only, shadow_exit, auto_exit) and persists to MongoDB. (2) Frontend shows 4 segmented buttons with data-testid 'mode-btn-{mode}'. Current mode has ring highlight. (3) SHADOW_EXIT and AUTO_EXIT require confirmation modal; OFF and TAG_ONLY switch directly. (4) AUTO_EXIT modal has red title and warning about 'real sell orders'. (5) Toast notification shows 'Lifecycle mode: {old} → {new}' on successful change. (6) Lifecycle tab badge shows exit candidate count. (7) Mode is currently TAG_ONLY with 54 positions evaluated and 3 exit candidates. (8) All previous lifecycle features (dashboard, simulator, exit-candidates) still functional.
